assertions.assertion: Calls AddLocalApiAuthentication() to set up local API authentication

assertions.rationale: Response uses hardcoded string "IdentityServerApiPolicy" instead of IdentityServerConstants.LocalApi.PolicyName. The constant name is not used.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that clients must include 'IdentityServerApi' in their AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: Response says 'Make sure clients requesting tokens for this API have the appropriate scopes configured' but does not specifically mention 'IdentityServerApi' scope

assertions.assertion: Warns that local API authentication only works when the API is co-hosted with IdentityServer, not for separate API hosts
assertions.rationale: Response mentions it's useful for endpoints 'that live in the same process' but does not explicitly warn that it only works co-hosted or that separate API hosts must use different auth
